name: GREEN STICKY RICE WITH COCONUT

ingredients.item: dried green sticky rice flakes (see Note)
shredded young coconut or 1 ounce (28 g) dried coconut flakes, rehydrated (see Note)

method: In a medium bowl, combine dried green sticky rice with coconut milk, mix well, and let sit for 10 minutes.
In a medium skillet, combine shredded coconut and sugar, and cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, for about 2 minutes.
Add rice and cook and stir until all rice flakes come together to make one sticky gelatinous mass (3 to 5 minutes). Remove from heat.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal-size portions and spoon each onto the center of a rice cracker. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.
